tutoring_page.title: Private Tutoring
tutoring_page.subtitle: Struggling with a course? Get personalized 1-on-1 tutoring sessions from Technion students who have passed the course with honors.
tutoring_page.col1_desc: Tailored to your specific needs — whether it's exam prep, homework help, or deep concept review.
tutoring_page.col2_desc: Learn from someone who took the same courses, with the same professors, at the Technion.
tutoring_page.col3_desc: In-person at the Technion or online via Zoom — whatever works best for you.
tutoring_page.courses_desc: Tutoring is available for most courses in the Biotechnology & Food Engineering program.
tutoring_page.cta_subtitle: Send me a message on WhatsApp and we'll schedule your first session.
tutoring_page.whatsapp_message: Hey Beny, I'm interested in a private tutoring session 📚
